annotation_summary: Freak arm/elbow injury ended the flyweight title fight in 26 seconds; UFCStats records KO/TKO but not the injury context.

event_name: UFC Fight Night: Ortega vs. Rodriguez
annotation_summary: Ortega suffered a shoulder injury during a grappling exchange; official result is TKO for Rodriguez.

event_name: UFC Fight Night - Fight for the Troops
annotation_summary: Hill suffered a broken leg after Hartt checked a kick; official result is KO/TKO but the finish was injury-driven.

Santos missed featherweight by 1.5 pounds; bout proceeded at catchweight with purse forfeiture.
Diaz stepped in on short notice after Rafael dos Anjos withdrew; bout also shifted McGregor up to welterweight.
Bisping replaced Chris Weidman on short notice and won the middleweight title.
Masvidal replaced Gilbert Burns on six days' notice for the welterweight title fight.
Silva replaced Jon Jones on very short notice in a non-title light heavyweight bout.
Iaquinta became the final short-notice title-fight opponent after multiple UFC 223 opponent changes.

Usman stepped in for Paulo Costa on short notice and made his UFC middleweight debut.
Jones returned after more than three years away and made his heavyweight debut to win the vacant heavyweight title.
St-Pierre came off a four-year layoff and moved to middleweight for an immediate title shot.
